metadata.title: Premium Essential Oil Products | Kodai Global Exports
metadata.description: Explore our range of export-grade essential oils including premium Lemongrass Oil (75-85% citral) and Eucalyptus Oil (60-80% cineole). Steam-distilled, quality-tested, and export-ready with FSSAI certification.

openGraph.title: Premium Essential Oil Products | Kodai Global Exports
openGraph.description: Export-grade Lemongrass Oil & Eucalyptus Oil. Steam-distilled, quality-tested, FSSAI certified.

slides.title: Pure {Lemongrass} Essential Oil
slides.subtitle: Refresh. Revive. Rejuvenate. Our 100% pure steam-distilled lemongrass oil meets the highest global export standards.

slides.title: Therapeutic {Eucalyptus} Oil
slides.subtitle: 100% Pure & Natural. Steam-distilled to preserve high Cineole content, perfect for pharmaceutical and wellness use.

hero.title: Premium oil products built for {reliable exports}
hero.subtitle: Export-grade Lemongrass and Eucalyptus Oils, prepared for quality-focused buyers in Indian and international markets.

range.title: Products prepared for consistent quality and export readiness

brands.title: Brands We've {Worked With}
brands.subtitle: Proud to have supplied premium essential oils to discerning brands across the fragrance, wellness, and botanical extract industries.

soon.title: More products coming soon
soon.description: We are expanding our portfolio with additional essential oils and natural extracts while keeping the same quality-focused export process.
